At some point u gotta take responsibility for what u feed ur brain.

If certain content doesn't add value to ur brand, stop seeking it out.

Mute. Block. Unfollow. Delete app.

Ur feed shapes how u think and what u tolerate.

Audit carefully or become a degen.

If ur an ecom founder fixated on something stupidly specific:

Lean into it.

Broad ideas die in ur mom's garage.
